sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35646" key="e)nqumhma/tion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνθῡμ-ημάτιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐνθύμημα,</foreign> <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Gell.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7(6).13.4</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
